affected_locations.label: root_control
affected_locations.detail: endpoint is arbitrary text with no scheme/host allowlist or push-service constraint

affected_locations.label: root_control
affected_locations.detail: owner_all RLS lets an authenticated user write their own subscription rows

affected_locations.label: entrypoint/wrapper
affected_locations.detail: service-role cron selects all stored endpoints

affected_locations.label: sink
affected_locations.detail: stored endpoint is placed in pushSub and passed to webPush.sendNotification

evidence: Repository code shows authenticated owner-writable endpoint storage flowing into service-role web-push-reminders sendNotification. Dynamic confirmation of web-push URL acceptance and network egress policy remains for validation.

facts: Authenticated user writes own web_push_subscriptions.endpoint; cron reads all rows with service role; due reminder path sends to sub.endpoint through webPush.sendNotification. Controls observed: row ownership, unique endpoint, stale pruning; missing: endpoint destination allowlist/canonicalization.
